title: Is Rei Shinjis cousin or something
display_title: Is Rei Shinjis cousin or something
wikitext:
[]: Is Rei... Shinji's cousin or something?             Quote Post by Titanium » Wed Nov 02, 2011 5:49 pm Yui>Shinji ^ Gendo | Via insemination/cloning/genetic material: Rei? Anybody catch my drift? Are they related? That just took doujins to a whole new level....

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Nov 02, 2011 5:58 pm Normally we argue whether she's his sister or a member of a different hominid species or maybe both at the same time.

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Wed Nov 02, 2011 6:00 pm In a sense, Rei is a sister of sorts to Shinji, due to the fact she is a clone of Yui. Rei being a clone of Yui must mean she possesses some of Yui's genetic material, so she is also like a daughter to Gendo. I am slightly confused by your explanation of your theory at the start of the thread, but I assume you are seeing them as being related as family members. So Rei could be veiwed as Shinji's sister, or in your case, his cousin. Rei' character page on the wiki may or may not shed some light on the subject for you: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Rei_Ayanami Her in-depth page may also help: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Theory_and_Analysis:Rei_Ayanami_(In-Depth)

[]:             Quote Post by Titanium » Wed Nov 02, 2011 6:05 pm Yes, I was implying that they would be siblings/family members. Or as Mr. Tines said, is she even considered a human?

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Wed Nov 02, 2011 6:10 pm This thread has relevance of epic proportions... sorta. Anyways, I think it is more openly accepted to the slightly more informed viewers of Eva that she is her sister. But, if you want to get real crazy, you can say she is the "biological mother that turned out to be ten years younger then him despite the fact that it is the body that is 4 years old and that the soul of his mother (which is fragmented) is 20+ years old" . Or something like that.

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Wed Nov 02, 2011 6:21 pm Titanium wrote: Or as Mr. Tines said, is she even considered a human?

[]: Rei's state. Bl             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Wed Nov 02, 2011 6:26 pm Stryker wrote: I think it is more openly accepted to the slightly more informed viewers of Eva that she is her sister.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Wed Nov 02, 2011 6:31 pm That "slightly more informed" part means no more then it does. What I mean is that people who watched it before, and, although put thought into it, haven't done much analysis.

[]: Re: Rei's state. Bl             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Wed Nov 02, 2011 6:41 pm Alaska Slim wrote: In that case, you might just call her an Aunt.

[]: Re: Rei's state. Bl             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Wed Nov 02, 2011 6:42 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: Rei being an Aunt to Shinji makes more sense than calling her his sister, but I guess since Shinji and Rei look about the same age "though we don't know how old Rei really is" it's easier for common fans to see them as siblings .

[]: Re: Rei's state. Bl             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Wed Nov 02, 2011 6:57 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: "though we don't know how old Rei really is"

[]:             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Wed Nov 02, 2011 7:00 pm I think Rei is Shinji's mum with the soul of an Angel and a 14 year old body. I still support Shinji/Rei though.

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Wed Nov 02, 2011 7:07 pm Cloning is a odd thing genetics can be modified to make the aging process go faster (examples Rey (or perhaps it was Ray man there are so many ways to spell Ray) from gundam seed destiny and Rau le Cursay from gundam seed both had then bodies altered during their creation so they age faster). It would not surprise me if Gendo altered Rei’s genetics so she could age faster till she reached a certain point (think it is called short telomeres or something like that) and @ topic I view her as a sister

[]: Re: Rei's state. Bl             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Wed Nov 02, 2011 7:07 pm ReiAyanami25 wrote: I view Rei as being the age she appears as, but in episode 21, around 2010, Rei one appears to be about four years old. However she could have been older than she looked, but Rei's wiki page also states that there is a possibility that Gendo has the ability to control the way and pace in which she grows. So it really is a mystery how old Rei is, but I think that she is most likely the age that she is stated to be.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Wed Nov 02, 2011 7:17 pm I don't think it actually grows, but that they give they (artificially) give it enough cells for it to maintain it's current form. Although, I am not sure. If Rei 1 was seven in 08', she would've grown naturally to fourteen by 15'.

[]: Re: Rei's state. Bl             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Wed Nov 02, 2011 7:18 pm ReiAyanami25 wrote: I view Rei as being the age she appears as, but in episode 21, around 2010, Rei one appears to be about four years old. However she could have been older than she looked, but Rei's wiki page also states that there is a possibility that Gendo has the ability to control the way and pace in which she grows. So it really is a mystery how old Rei is, but I think that she is most likely the age that she is stated to be.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Wed Nov 02, 2011 7:22 pm Stryker wrote: I don't think it actually grows, but that they give they (artificially) give it enough cells for it to maintain it's current form. Although, I am not sure. If Rei 1 was seven in 08', she would've grown naturally to fourteen by 15'.

[]: Re: Rei's state. Bl             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Wed Nov 02, 2011 7:22 pm ReiAyanami25 wrote: Wait, wait. I have changed my answer. If Rei one was less than a year old in 2010 this would make Rei two about four years old, but this depends on the age of Rei one. She may appear to be the age of her fellow pilots, but as the wiki said, it is possible that Gendo can control the rate that she grows.

[]: Re: Rei's state. Bl             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Wed Nov 02, 2011 7:24 pm ReiAyanami25 wrote: She may appear to be the age of her fellow pilots, but as the wiki said, it is possible that Gendo can control the rate that she grows.

[]:             Quote Post by The Abhorrent » Wed Nov 02, 2011 7:43 pm Genetically, Rei is a "clone" of Yui.... so one could infer that she's Shinji's aunt (technically speaking), if one were to say she's effectively his mother's identical twin. However, their similar ages often lead to many saying she's closer to a sister or half-sister. Hypothetically, this latter relation could also be used to describe their relationship (loving, but not necessarily romantic); though that could easily be a matter of one's viewpoint. This is all before factoring her angelic traits, which could mean many things. Concerning Rei's age & origins, the one theory I would consider the best explanation so far is that she was created accidentally . Specifically, she was born as a result of the attempted extraction to get Yui out of Unit 01. It's alluded that Fuyusutski created Rei, not Gendo (though the latter is the one using her); not to mention the professor is the expert in that field, whereas the commander is not (smart & gathered a lot of knowledge through osmosis, but never the actual expert). Assuming the Eva was still attached to Lilith at the time of experiment (there's an image floating around for that), this could account for just about everything. When the extraction was attempted (which is alluded to, briefly, when they're trying to get Shinji out), Rei came out instead of Yui. Rei technically is Lilith, having the angel's soul. As for her appearance at that point, she'd be a child-version of Yui who would be the same age as Shinji (mother thinking of her son?) with albinism (which would be due to her angelic traits). All the Rei clones? They fell off Lilith (presumably over time), the eventual form of all those little legs sprouting off the angel's main body. Well, that's my thoughts. Rei is as chronologically as old as the attempted extraction. Physically, she's the same age as Shinji... potentially to the day (through that's improbably accurate). Edit: .... okay, for some reason this post is showing up on both pages. Seems like a double post, but editing one edits the other... or something.
